ogTitle: Beadell vs Beaufort River: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Beadell and Beaufort River.
heading: Beadell vs Beaufort River — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beadell, Western Australia and Beaufort River, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaufort River has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Beadell (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beadell or Beaufort River safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beadell has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Beaufort River scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beadell scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Beaufort River scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beadell or Beaufort River?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaufort River has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
